description: Design a vertical axis wind turbine (VAWT) rotor blade named 'UrbanDarrieus' in QBlade using a symmetric NACA 0021 airfoil (4-digit series, max thickness 21%). The rotor should feature an H-Type (straight blade) geometry with 3 blades, a height of 2.0m, and a radius of 1.0m. Define two stations (bottom and top) with a chord of 0.15m and a foil offset (radius) of 1.0m using the NACA 0021 airfoil. Save the complete project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/urban_darrieus_vawt.wpa.
